title: The Card Reader's Secret
description: You've obtained a Book Token — it tells you whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Use it alongside aspect clues to identify the alchemical.

hints.text: The Book Token tells you ingredient 1 is Solar. Solar alchemicals have 0 or 2 negative aspects. List which alchemicals have R+ and G−.
R+ G− is shared by pNn and Ppn. pNn has signs R+G−B−: 2 negatives = Solar. Ppn has R+G+B−: 1 negative = Lunar. The Book Token says Solar, so it must be pNn.
The answer is pNn (alchemical 3). It has R+, G−, B− — two negatives, which makes it Solar.
